column1: Fig. 5. In vitro eﬀects of BLN on gastrointestinal epithelial cells (Caco-2).
(A) % Cell viability of Caco-2 cells treated with diﬀerent concentrations of free
insulin, blank SLN, blank BLN and insulin-loaded BLN. Results represent mean

of 3 determinations ± SD.
(B) Uptake of ﬂuorescent-labeled BLN by Caco-
2 cells. Left: cells only without BLN as control; Right: cells treated with BLN.
Nanocarriers are in red and nuclei are in blue. Bar = 50 μm, 10× objective.
(For interpretation of the references to colour in this ﬁgure legend, the reader is

referred to the Web version of
this article.)
